mapper.select: select case when ll.value is null then 0 else ll.value end value, rr.label_name as name, rr.label_level as id from (select '1' as id, count(sjzybq1) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq1 is not null union all select '2' as id, count(sjzybq2) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq2 is not null union all select '3' as id, count(sjzybq3) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq3 is not null union all select '4' as id, count(sjzybq4) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq4 is not null union all select '5' as id, count(sjzybq5) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq5 is not null union all select '6' as id, count(sjzybq6) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq6 is not null ) ll right join DSM_LABEL_CODE_TABLE rr ON ll.id = rr.label_level order by rr.label_level asc
select distinct label_level as id, label_name as name from DSM_LABEL_CODE_TABLE order by label_level
